meta.title: Kuldeepsinh Jhala | Software Engineer
meta.subtitle: End-to-end software engineer building scalable, secure, cloud-native systems
meta.description: Personal portfolio of Kuldeepsinh Jhala, a software engineer with 2+ years of experience delivering complete software solutions — from requirements gathering to AWS cloud deployment — with strong backend, frontend, and system design expertise.

hero.name: Kuldeepsinh Jhala
hero.tagline: Designing, building, and deploying complete software systems on the cloud
hero.subtitle: Backend-driven full stack engineer with strong frontend engineering and AWS deployment experience.
hero.description: I am a software engineer with hands-on experience delivering complete software solutions end to end — from understanding client requirements and designing system architecture to building secure applications and deploying them on AWS cloud infrastructure. I focus on writing clean, maintainable code, building scalable backend systems, optimizing frontend performance, and delivering production-ready applications.

stats.label: Years of Experience
stats.description: Professional experience building, deploying, and maintaining full stack software systems.

stats.label: End-to-End Deployments
stats.description: Projects delivered from requirements gathering to AWS cloud deployment.

stats.label: Cloud Projects
stats.description: Production deployments using AWS EC2, RDS, dynamoDB, lambda functions, and S3.

items.title: Scalable Backend Architecture
items.description: Designing sustainable backend systems with proper layering, authentication, authorization, and role-based access control.

items.title: AWS Production Deployments
items.description: Deploying and managing applications on AWS using EC2, RDS, Load Balancers, Redis caching, and secure configurations.

items.title: Frontend Performance & Structure
items.description: Optimizing frontend performance, maintaining structured codebases, and implementing validations and security.
